parsed.production_notes: The video relies heavily on AI-generated imagery, evidenced by the uncanny smoothness of the human character's skin and the unnatural, minimal movements. The lip-syncing is artificial, and the overall aesthetic has the polished, slightly plastic look typical of current AI video generation tools.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a slim build and fair complexion. She has dark hair styled in a tight, high bun. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid, light pink hooded sweatshirt throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Eager, attentive, and slightly hesitant when making mistakes.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a glossy white casing. It has glowing blue eyes and exposed mechanical details in the neck area. The face is sculpted to resemble human features but remains distinctly robotic.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; its white robotic casing serves as its exterior.

panels.panel_visual_description: A side-profile shot of Character A and Character B facing each other. Character A is positioned on the right side of the frame, looking left. Character B is on the left side, looking right. The background is a soft, out-of-focus abstract pattern of gray and white tones. The lighting is even and soft, highlighting the glossy finish of the robot and the smooth skin of the woman. Both characters maintain a relatively static pose, with only slight movements in their faces.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman and a robot facing each other in profile against a blurred background. Text overlays appear in the center, and a UK flag icon is briefly shown. The overall composition is balanced and static.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Quy tắc đầu tiên để học tiếng Anh là gì? [What is the first rule to learn English?]
Character B says: Đừng học, hãy sử dụng nó! Bạn chỉ cần nói chuyện với người bản ngữ thôi! [Don't study, use it! You just need to talk to native speakers!]
Character A says: Bằng cách nào? [How?]
Character B says: Với Learna AI. [With Learna AI.]
scenes.on_screen_text: QUY TẮC ĐẦU TIÊN ĐỂ HỌC TIẾNG ANH LÀ GÌ? Đừng học, HÃY SỬ DỤNG NÓ! BẠN CHỈ CẦN NÓI CHUYỆN VỚI NGƯỜI BẢN NGỮ THÔI! BẰNG CÁCH NÀO? VỚI LEARNA AI

scenes.setting: Top: abstract dark background. Bottom: cozy room with bookshelves.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B is framed from the chest up, facing directly forward. The background is dark with concentric white circular lines resembling sound waves radiating outward from behind the robot's head. The robot's expression is neutral, and its blue eyes are illuminated.

Character A is seated in front of a black studio microphone, framed from the chest up. The background is a softly lit room with bookshelves, creating a warm, cozy atmosphere. She gestures slightly with her hands as she speaks, showing a range of expressions from hesitant to realizing.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with the AI robot on top and the human learner on the bottom. The robot appears against a stylized soundwave background, while the woman is in a realistic, warm room setting. Text overlays and icons appear over the video to indicate correct and incorrect speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Umm.. I have 22. [Umm.. I have 22.]
Character B says: Bạn muốn nói: "I'm 22"? đúng không? [You mean: "I'm 22"? right?]
Character A says: À đúng rồi, là 'I'm 22'. [Ah right, it's 'I'm 22'.]
Character B says: Linh, where are you from? [Linh, where are you from?]
Character A says: Uhh... I am Vietnam. [Uhh... I am Vietnam.]
Character B says: Linh, cố gắng tốt đấy, nhưng em phải nói: "I am from Vietnam". [Linh, good try, but you have to say: "I am from Vietnam".]
Character A says: Xin lỗi, em hay nhầm lắm. I am from Vietnam. [Sorry, I often make mistakes. I am from Vietnam.]
Character B says: Không sao đâu, chúng ta sẽ cải thiện tiếng Anh bằng cách luyện nói mỗi ngày cùng nhau nhé. [It's okay, we will improve English by practicing speaking every day together.]
scenes.on_screen_text: How old are you? Umm.. I have 22 ❌ Bạn muốn nói: "I'm 22"? đúng không? À đúng rồi, là 'I'm 22' ✅ Linh, where are you from Uhh... I am Vietnam ❌ Linh, cố gắng tốt đấy, nhưng em phải nói: "I am from Vietnam" Xin lỗi, em hay nhầm lắm. I am from Vietnam ✅ Không sao đâu, chúng ta sẽ cải thiện tiếng Anh bằng cách luyện nói mỗi ngày cùng nhau nhé.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark blue gradient background. There are no characters or physical props present in this scene. The lighting is a simple, even gradient from a lighter center to darker edges.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a static end card with a dark blue gradient background. A large app icon featuring the robot's face is centered, surrounded by text prompting the user to download the app and start practicing. App store badges are also visible.
scenes.on_screen_text: TẢI NGAY! BẮT ĐẦU LUYỆN TẬP Learna Tải về trên App Store TẢI TRÊN Google Play
